name: Smokey Jollof Rice
description: Authentic firewood smokey jollof rice served with grilled chicken, moin-moin and fried plantain.

name: Special Egusi Soup
description: Rich melon seed soup with assorted meat, stockfish, and spinach. Served with your choice of swallow.

name: Gourmet Beef Suya
description: Spiced grilled beef skewers with extra yaji spice, onions, and cabbage.
